sections.paragraph:
- Original: στιγμή

- Transliteration: Stigme

- Phonetic: stig-may'

- Definition:

1. an instant (i.e. a moment) of time

- Origin: from G4742

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Noun Feminine

- Strong's: Feminine of G4742; a point of time that is an instant: - moment.
